rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: PowerShell Suspicious .NET Methods

rules.rule_text:
title: PowerShell Suspicious .NET Methods
id: 016c4ee2-ca34-474b-bfdc-43e017a29b47
status: experimental
description: "Detects the loading of suspicious .NET methods, seen in PowerShell script\
  \ load content. This \nbehavior is not limited to Yellow Cockatoo and can be applied\
  \ universally for malicious \nPowerShell obfuscation attempts. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/yellow-cockatoo/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1140
- attack.t1574
- attack.t1574.013
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: ps_script
  definition: 'Requirements: Script Block Logging must be enabled'
detection:
  selection:
    ScriptBlockText|contains:
    - aescryptoserviceprovider
    - frombase64string
    - user32.dll
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
